tasks.title: Fix non-interactive mode handling in sanity checks and init
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/sanity/mod.rs :: fn is_tty :: atty check returns false in non-interactive environments causing issues
path: crates/ralph/src/sanity/mod.rs :: lines 758-760 :: is_tty() only checks stdin, not appropriate for all commands
workflow: ralph init --non-interactive :: documented as required in AGENTS.md tests but UX is inconsistent
repro: Run ralph init in non-interactive shell without --non-interactive flag :: expected graceful fallback or clear error :: actual may hang or fail unexpectedly
plan: Review all interactive prompts in sanity/ and init/ modules
Add consistent --non-interactive flag support to all commands that may prompt
Improve error messages when TTY is required but not available
Add tests for non-interactive mode behavior
Verify by running commands in subshell with stdin redirected from /dev/null

tasks.title: Harden Ctrl+C handling in runner execution to prevent stuck processes
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/runner/execution/process.rs :: fn wait_for_child :: Ctrl-C handling relies on external flag state
path: crates/ralph/src/runner/execution/process.rs :: lines 387-389 :: interrupted flag checked but may miss rapid signals
path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/mod.rs :: lines 383-386 :: Ctrl+C state reset but not validated
repro: Send multiple rapid Ctrl+C during runner execution :: expected clean termination :: actual may leave orphan processes or hang
plan: Add timeout to Ctrl+C grace period to prevent infinite waits
Ensure process group is killed even if individual process detach
Add validation that Ctrl+C state was properly initialized before use
Add integration test for signal handling during runner execution
Verify by running runner and sending signals with kill command

tasks.title: Document error handling strategy and patterns for contributors
evidence: path: AGENTS.md :: Error handling section exists but lacks concrete examples
path: crates/ralph/src/run/mod.rs :: Uses RunnerError, anyhow, and custom errors inconsistently
path: crates/ralph/src/runutil.rs :: abort_reason() pattern not documented for new contributors
config: docs/ :: No error-handling.md file exists despite being referenced
plan: Create docs/error-handling.md with comprehensive error handling guide
Document when to use anyhow vs thiserror vs custom enums
Add examples for each error handling pattern used in codebase
Document the abort_reason() pattern for run loop error classification
Add section on runner error redaction and safeguarding
Verify by reviewing new doc with make ci and ensuring clarity

tasks.title: Add validation step after JSON repair in queue loading
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/queue.rs :: fn load_queue_with_repair :: repairs JSON but doesn't validate result
path: crates/ralph/src/queue.rs :: lines 78-101 :: repair attempt made but success only checks parsing, not semantic validity
path: crates/ralph/src/queue.rs :: lines 106-201 :: attempt_json_repair may produce invalid queue structure
repro: Create queue.json with single-quoted strings and unescaped newlines :: expected repaired valid queue :: actual may parse but have incorrect structure
plan: Add QueueFile schema validation after successful JSON repair parsing
Validate required fields (version, tasks array) are present and correct
Add warning when repair changes queue semantics (e.g., lost fields)
Add test for repair producing semantically valid but incorrect queue
Verify by testing with malformed queue files and checking output

tasks.title: Improve TUI dependency graph handling for large task sets
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/tui/events/dependency_graph.rs :: No caching of computed graph
path: crates/ralph/src/tui/events/dependency_graph.rs :: Graph recomputed on every render
path: crates/ralph/src/tui/app.rs :: Dependency visualization may block UI with 100+ tasks
repro: Open TUI with 200+ tasks having dependencies :: expected responsive UI :: actual UI may lag or freeze during graph updates
plan: Add caching layer for computed dependency graph
Invalidate cache only when queue is modified
Add lazy/deferred rendering for large graphs
Consider limiting graph depth for very large task sets
Add performance test with large queue
Verify by profiling TUI with 200+ task queue

tasks.title: Fix runner timeout handling for graceful shutdown edge cases
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/runner/execution/process.rs :: fn wait_for_child :: SIGINT sent but no tracking of response
path: crates/ralph/src/runner/execution/process.rs :: lines 144-155 :: timeout interrupt sends signal but doesn't verify delivery
path: crates/ralph/src/runner/execution/runners.rs :: Runner-specific timeout handling inconsistent (some don't respect grace period)
repro: Set 1s timeout on long-running runner :: expected graceful shutdown after 1s + 2s grace :: actual may hang indefinitely if SIGINT ignored
plan: Verify SIGINT delivery by checking process exit within grace period
Ensure SIGKILL is always sent after grace period expires, regardless of process state
Add consistent timeout handling across all 7 runners
Add test for runner ignoring SIGINT (should still terminate via SIGKILL)
Verify by running runner that ignores SIGINT with short timeout

tasks.title: Add module-level documentation for complex TUI components
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/tui/app.rs :: Lines 1-59 :: Missing module-level doc explaining App state machine
path: crates/ralph/src/tui/events/mod.rs :: No documentation for event routing architecture
path: crates/ralph/src/tui/events/dependency_graph.rs :: Complex graph rendering lacks high-level overview
plan: Add //! module docs to tui/app.rs explaining App struct responsibilities
Document the event routing pattern (handle_key_event -> mode dispatch)
Add architecture overview for TUI state management
Document the filter/sort/search state interactions
Verify by reading docs and confirming understanding of TUI architecture

tasks.title: Unify and document session timeout configuration
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/session/mod.rs :: lines 121-134 :: session timeout hardcoded via parameter, not configurable
path: crates/ralph/src/constants/timeouts.rs :: DEFAULT_SESSION_TIMEOUT_HOURS exists but not exposed in config
path: schemas/config.schema.json :: No session.timeout_hours or similar configuration option
config: crates/ralph/src/config.rs :: Session timeout not part of Resolved config
plan: Add session.timeout_hours to Config contract
Update session validation to use config value instead of hardcoded parameter
Add session configuration section to docs/configuration.md
Ensure default matches current behavior (24 hours)
Add test for custom session timeout configuration
Verify by setting custom timeout and checking session behavior

tasks.title: Improve template variable error reporting and validation
evidence: path: crates/ralph/src/template/variables.rs :: fn substitute_variables :: unknown variables silently left as-is
path: crates/ralph/src/template/variables.rs :: lines 155-175 :: No warning when {{variable}} not found in context
path: crates/ralph/src/template/variables.rs :: fn detect_git_branch :: silently returns None on git errors
repro: Create task with {{nonexistent}} variable :: expected warning about unknown variable :: actual silently preserved in output
plan: Add warnings for unknown template variables
Add --strict-templates flag to fail on unknown variables
Improve error reporting when git branch detection fails
Add validation of template variables at task creation time
Add test for unknown variable detection
Verify by creating task with unknown variable and checking output

tasks.title: Implement subtask support for hierarchical task breakdown
evidence: No parent/child relationship fields in Task schema
Large tasks cannot be broken down into trackable subtasks
PRD multi-task mode creates sequential dependencies but not true subtasks
plan: Add `parent_id` field to Task for child-to-parent reference
Add `subtasks` array field or compute dynamically from parent_id
Add `ralph task subtask create <PARENT_ID> <REQUEST>` command
Update parent task progress based on subtask completion percentage
Block parent task completion until all subtasks are done
Update TUI to show collapsible subtask hierarchies
Update queue graph to show parent-child relationships
Add tests for subtask lifecycle and parent completion blocking

tasks.title: Improve test coverage for edge cases in queue operations
evidence: Batch operations have tests but edge cases may be missing
No tests for concurrent queue modifications
Limited tests for validation edge cases (circular deps, max depth)
Archive operations need more failure mode coverage
plan: Review current test coverage for queue operations
Add tests for: circular dependency detection, max depth exceeded
Add tests for: concurrent modification scenarios
Add tests for: invalid UTF-8 in task fields
Add tests for: queue file corruption handling
Ensure all failure modes have test coverage

tasks.title: Document security considerations for runner execution
evidence: No centralized security documentation for runner execution
Redaction exists but not documented for developers
Safeguard dumps behavior described in README but not in dev docs
No guidance on handling secrets in runner output
plan: Create docs/security.md with runner security considerations
Document redaction behavior and patterns
Document safeguard dumps and when they are created
Add security section to runner module docs
Document best practices for handling sensitive data
Review AGENTS.md security section for completeness

tasks.title: Add conditional task execution based on custom conditions
evidence: No conditional execution support in task schema
Cannot skip tasks based on file existence, env vars, or command output
All tasks in queue are attempted regardless of context
plan: Add `condition` field to Task with type and parameters
Support condition types: file_exists, env_set, command_success, task_status
Add `ralph task condition <TASK_ID> <TYPE> <PARAM>` command
Evaluate condition before task execution in run one/loop
Skip task with log message if condition not met
Add `--skip-conditions` flag to bypass condition checks
Add tests for each condition type

tasks.title: Add interactive context init and update wizards
evidence: docs/cli.md shows `--interactive` flag for context init/update as 'not yet implemented'
Context creation requires manual editing of AGENTS.md
No guided wizard for updating specific sections
plan: Implement `ralph context init --interactive` wizard
Guide user through project type selection with descriptions
Prompt for key configuration values (runner, model, CI command)
Preview generated AGENTS.md before writing
Implement `ralph context update --interactive`
Show list of sections that can be updated
Allow interactive input for new learnings per section
Add tests for interactive prompts and output validation

tasks.title: Add task splitting command to break down large tasks
evidence: No command to split a task into subtasks
Large tasks require manual creation of replacement tasks
No preservation of original task context when breaking down
plan: Add `ralph task split <TASK_ID>` command
Mark original task as split (new status or custom field)
Create child tasks linked via parent_id (depends on subtask feature)
Preserve original scope, evidence, plan in parent task
Distribute plan items across child tasks
Add `--interactive` mode to guide splitting process
Add `--number <N>` to create N empty child tasks
Update docs/cli.md with split examples

tasks.title: Implement IDE extensions for VS Code and JetBrains
evidence: No IDE extensions exist for Ralph
Users must switch between terminal and editor to check task status
No inline task creation from TODO comments in code
plan: Create VS Code extension with task tree view
Show current task, queue, and done tasks in sidebar
Add commands: run task, mark done, create task from selection
Highlight TODO/FIXME comments with quick-create task actions
Create JetBrains plugin with equivalent functionality
Support task status indicators in editor gutter
Add configuration for ralph binary path
Document installation and usage for both extensions
